trivia_bullets.text: Reave Soul is a reprint — originally from Magic Origins (2015), then Iconic Masters (2017), ELD (2019), Jumpstart 2022, and The List (ORI-115, 2024). Five total printings.

Flavor text is a barrow witch incantation attributed to the Wilds faction — witches outside the five royal courts who practice vengeance-rooted folk magic. The same attribution ('Barrow witch incantation') appears on Tempting Witch (ELD 108), suggesting a deliberate flavor cycle across the set's black Wilds cards.
sources: WebSearch: Throne of Eldraine flavor gems analysis via coolstuffinc.com

trivia_bullets.text: Destroys target creature with power 3 or less at {1}{B} sorcery speed. EDHREC rank 20,096 — deep-cuts common, not a Commander staple.
Artist Naomi Baker. The amethyst gem in the art directly literalizes the flavor text's 'into amethyst, I pour' line — strong art-flavor alignment in the common slot.

related_cards.name: Tempting Witch
related_cards.note: Shares 'Barrow witch incantation' flavor-text attribution; same Wilds faction

related_cards.name: Barrow Witches
related_cards.note: Creature card depicting the barrow witch faction; flavor-cycle connection
